data.title: HMDA and Housing Demand
data.description: Recent data from the Home Mortgage Disclosure Act (HMDA) has shown a decrease in the number of home-purchase loan applications nationwide. The figure has dropped significantly from 7.9 million to 6.5 million. This decline highlights a noticeable shift in housing demand within the housing market.

data.title: US readies for WTO summit
data.description: Over the course of the last year, President Donald Trump has significantly ignored the World Trade Organization (WTO) and disrupted norms, regulations, and even laws of the United States in his efforts to transform international trade.

data.title: Basta Receives $800,000 Grant from Carnegie Corporation of New York to Help First-Generation Students Secure Strong First Jobs
data.description: Basta has secured an $800,000 grant over 24 months to enhance its reach to over 100,000 students and broaden its presence in four regions. The investment aims to boost initial job prospects for first-generation individuals on a national scale. The announcement was made in New York on April 29, 2026.

data.title: RCI Banque issues EUR 900M fixed rate notes, due in Feb 2030.
data.description: A recent report highlights the increase in job opportunities in the technology sector. The data reveals that the industry has seen a 15% rise in job openings compared to last year. The report also shows that there are over 500,000 tech-related positions currently available. This surge in job opportunities demonstrates the growing demand for skilled tech professionals in the market.Experts suggest that candidates with expertise in areas such as cybersecurity, data analysis, and software development are in high demand. The report further indicates that tech companies are offering competitive salaries and benefits to attract top talent. Overall, the data reflects a positive trend in the technology job market with ample opportunities for individuals looking to further their careers in this field.

data.title: SUNation Energy Announces Review of Strategic Alternatives to Maximize Shareholder Value
data.description: On April 9, 2026, Sunation Energy, Inc. (Nasdaq: SUNE), a top supplier of solar energy systems, battery storage, and energy services, located in Ronkonkoma, New York, declared that its Board of Directors has approved exploring various strategic options to enhance shareholder value and ensure the Company's future success.

data.title: Stock Market Today: S&P 500, Nasdaq Score Record Highs On War Ceasefire; Tesla Shares Jump (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the stock market saw positive movement with the Dow Jones index increasing after the announcement of an extension to the U.S.-Iran ceasefire by President Trump. Meanwhile, Tesla is set to release its earnings report later in the day. In related news, both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq achieved record highs. The S&P 500 index closed at an all-time high of XXXX points, while the Nasdaq reached XXXX points. Tesla's shares also experienced a noticeable jump following the news.

data.title: Tariff refunds incoming. Just not yet.
data.description: The U.S. Court of International Trade has required the Trump administration to provide an update this week regarding the refund process for the "emergency" tariffs that were invalidated last month. The administration needs to outline its plan for returning the tariffs, which were previously imposed, to affected parties. The tariffs in question were deemed unlawful, leading to the necessity for a refund. This update is crucial in ensuring timely and appropriate restitution to those impacted by the invalidated tariffs.

data.title: Jobs Report: Payrolls Dive In Shock To S&P 500, The Fed And Trump
data.description: In the latest February jobs report, there was an unexpected decline in payrolls, with a decrease of 92,000 jobs. This news led to additional losses in S&P 500 futures, putting pressure on the Federal Reserve. The situation poses a challenge for both the Fed and President Trump, as they now have to navigate the impact of this surprising drop in employment numbers.

data.title: Ardmore Shipping Provides Update on Fleet Investment, Dividend Policy, and Vessel Sale
data.description: Contracts have been finalized for the building of two 40,500 deadweight tonnage IMO2 product/chemical tankers. The dividend payout ratio will be increased to two-thirds of adjusted earnings starting from the first quarter of 2026. Furthermore, an agreement has been reached for the sale of a 2014-built MR tanker for $35.5 million, with delivery scheduled for June. Moreover, the MR Spot TCEs stand at $33,700 per day.

data.title: Instant Reaction: Mortgage Rates, August 29, 2024
data.description: Recent data from Freddie Mac reveals a decline in average 30-year fixed mortgage rates, dropping to 6.35% from the previous week's 6.46%. This change represents a significant shift in the housing market, with potential impacts on home financing and mortgage applications. This development, as reported by Jessica Lautz, highlights the importance of staying informed about mortgage rate fluctuations for those in the market for homes or considering refinancing. Stay updated on the latest trends in mortgages and home financing to make informed decisions.

data.title: Biomerica’s inFoods® IBS Data Accepted for Presentation at Digestive Disease Week 2026
data.description: A presentation on real-world clinical experiences regarding a new IBS-specific guided diagnostic therapy will take place at the largest GI medical conference in the world, scheduled for May 2-5, 2026, in Chicago. The event will provide insights into the outcomes and effectiveness of this novel approach in managing Irritable Bowel Syndrome. Experts will share their findings and data from practical applications, offering valuable information to healthcare professionals attending the conference. This presentation aims to contribute to the advancement of knowledge and potential improvements in the treatment of IBS.

data.title: Cove Kaz Capital Group Completes Financial Transaction to Acquire Majority Ownership in Tungsten Joint Venture in Kazakhstan
data.description: A new partnership has been established between Cove Kaz Capital Group and Kazakhstan's National Mining Company Tau-Ken Samruk. The joint venture, with a split ownership of 70% by Cove Kaz Capital Group and 30% by Tau-Ken Samruk, has been finalized. This collaboration brings together significant resources and expertise from both entities, showcasing a promising venture in the mining sector.

data.title: Silvercrest Establishes Atlanta Office, Hires Brittain Prigge
data.description: Brittain Prigge has recently joined Silvercrest to enhance the firm's footprint in a rapidly expanding wealth market in the country. This move is aimed at solidifying Silvercrest's position in a market that is experiencing significant growth.

data.title: DELPHX ANNOUNCES CLOSING OF NON-BROKERED UNIT PRIVATE PLACEMENT
data.description: DelphX Capital Markets Inc., a company listed on the TSXV as DELX and OTCQB as DPXCF, recently closed a non-brokered private placement announced on April 22, 2026. The placement involved the issuance of 3,000,000 units at a subscription price of C$0.04 per unit, resulting in total gross proceeds of C$120,000. Each unit comprises one common share and one common share purchase warrant. The warrant allows the holder to buy one common share at a price of $0.08 within two years from the date of issuance.
